title: Trump orders military to pause Strait of Hormuz mission to allow time for peace talks
summary_full: Global stocks jumped and oil prices fell in reaction to Trump’s statement, which hailed “Great Progress” toward a peace deal. The mission, dubbed “Project Freedom,” had just begun.
summary_public: Global stocks jumped and oil prices fell in reaction to Trump’s statement, which hailed “Great Progress” toward a peace deal. The mission, dubbed “Project Freedom,” had just begun.
